scripts.test:executa: cd executa && node -e "const rl=require('readline');const s=require('fs').createReadStream(process.stdin.fd);const i=rl.createInterface({input:s});let r='';i.on('line',l=>{r+=JSON.stringify(JSON.parse(l))+'\n'});i.on('close',()=>{const l=r.trim().split('\n');const ok=l.length>0;console.log(ok?'PASS: '+l.length+' responses':'FAIL');process.exit(ok?0:1)});"
